title: AdversarialReviewOutput
description: Structured return from adversarial-reviewer (Stage 10). Three personas (Skeptic, Architect, Minimalist) attack the implementation.

verdict.description: PASS: no high-severity findings remain. CONTEST: quality issues that do not risk production (iterate, do not block). REJECT: would cause production failure / data loss / security breach (block; consider pivot).

lens.description: Which adversarial persona surfaced the finding.

research_ref.description: Optional COM-NNN / IMP-NNN reference from Stage 3 research grounding the challenge.

spec_faithful_but_wrong.description: Pivot trigger signal: true when the implementation faithfully follows the spec but the spec itself produces the wrong outcome. When set on iteration 2+, Stage 10 raises a PIVOT_REQUIRED error instead of looping again.
